name: mimesis-codex
description: Local Mimesis Engineering Codex plugin scaffold.

interface.shortDescription: Run Mimesis artifact-first loops inside Codex.
interface.longDescription: Mimesis Codex is a local prototype scaffold for guiding artifact-first Mimesis loops. It gives AI standards, not roles, and keeps proof boundaries visible.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me run a Mimesis loop on one weak artifact while preserving source-first evidence and proof boundaries.
